mentions.note: Stock is a jumping bean and volatile, but included in 'How to Make Money in Any Market' as potential future winner; not backing down on recommendation.
Extremely volatile (60+ 5% moves/year, PE over 100) but Cramer features it in 'How to Make Money' and not backing down despite 10% drops.
Volatile 20-point moves on any commentary; expected to be up this time but highly speculative.
Down 50% from highs, wild trader; Cramer likes CEO Steve Huffman execution, terrific product, solid buy despite volatility.
Down 30% despite great quarter and buyback; incredibly valuable property charging too little for advertising; would buy more at current oversold levels.
Down due to lawsuits but cases will be overturned. Buy gingerly (stock trades in 12-point increments). Won't let this repeat J&J/Burke sell-off patterns.

Database of human conversations essential for AI training; 7 consecutive quarters 60%+ growth, 90% gross margins, $1M CapEx (not building data centers), ad revenue +74%, unique audience (30% not on other socials); early innings of monetization; addresses loneliness epidemic.
Unique social media property with strong community moat. At 29x earnings, scale in purchases slowly rather than buy aggressively to manage risk.
